user_payload.normalized_incident_summary: Got some spray on me and maybe breathed some too.

allowed_guarded_actions.instruction: Move away from exposure and remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
Wash the exposed skin with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not keep wearing contaminated clothing or shoes.

escalation.instruction: Call a physician or poison control center immediately after rinsing starts.

parsed_json.incident_summary: Skin and potential inhalation exposure to Glyphosate isopropylamine salt.

immediate_actions.instruction: Move away from exposure and remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
Wash the exposed skin with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not keep wearing contaminated clothing or shoes.

escalate_now.instruction: Call a physician or poison control center immediately after rinsing starts.
escalate_now.reason: Ambiguous exposure route including potential inhalation and skin contact.
